recommendation.title: Adaptation run as planned, stay conservative
recommendation.reasoning: TSB is -25.8 — still carrying heavy fatigue from Saturday's 22.75km effort (265.6 TSS) and a short 2h sleep Sunday. HRV is 71ms, 8% above your 66ms baseline, and sleep score hit 95 last night — both strongly positive. Resting HR (43bpm) sits right at baseline (44bpm), no elevation. Tomorrow's session is already the easiest one in the plan (30 min adaptation run), so no swap needed — just keep the pace at 5:20/km rather than pushing toward 5:10.
recommendation.sessionDetail: 30 min continuous at easy pace, lean toward 5:20/km rather than 5:10/km given the fatigue. First running session of the plan — the goal is to calibrate feel, not hit a target pace.
recommendation.bikeNote: U-Bahn to work tomorrow — save the legs for the run. Bike home after is fine, it's only a 30-min easy effort.
